assignment.title: Forensic DNA Evidence Assignment
assignment.instructor_text:
Forensic DNA Analysis has been one of the most powerful and important tools that investigators use today.  It can give strong evidence for a suspect's guilt or innocence and is an indispensable tool in the forensic world.  The assignment below will allow you to demonstrate your understanding of DNA analysis in the context of forensic investigations.

Complete the following assignment about forensic DNA evidence. Click on the image below to make a copy of the Forensic DNA Evidence Assignment.  Remember to double click on the header to open it and add your name to the document.

When you have completed the assignment, upload it below and select Submit to complete your submission.

Revisit the Course Information section if you need a refresher on how to submit your assignments.
